class TaskManager:
    def __init__(self, mode="batch"):
        self.mode = mode
        self.results = []

    def run(self, data):
        if self.mode == "batch":
            return self._process_batch(data)
        elif self.mode == "stream":
            return self._process_stream(data)
        elif self.mode == "validate":
            return self._validate_only(data)
        elif self.mode == "export":
            return self._export(data)
        elif self.mode == "import":
            return self._import(data)

    def _process_batch(self, data):
        for item in data:
            self.results.append(transform(item))
        return self.results

    def _process_stream(self, data):
        for item in data:
            yield transform(item)

    def _validate_only(self, data):
        return all(validate(item) for item in data)

    def _export(self, data):
        with open("output.json", "w") as f:
            json.dump(data, f)

    def _import(self, data):
        with open(data, "r") as f:
            return json.load(f)

    def configure(self, **kwargs):
        for k, v in kwargs.items():
            setattr(self, k, v)

    def reset(self):
        self.results.clear()
        self.mode = "batch"
